title: Survivorship Bias Explained
script_summary: A concise explanation of survivorship bias and its implications in various fields.

segments.voiceover: Here's what science actually says about survivorship bias.
Ever heard of the WWII plane story? Only the surviving planes were studied.
This leads to a critical mistake: we ignore failures. What if the lost planes held the key?
Survivorship bias affects finance too. Investors often look at successful companies without considering the failed ones.
Recognizing this bias helps us make better decisions and understand risks. Don't just study survivors.
Want to dive deeper into science? Like and follow for more insights!
